articles.author: Ashley Ferrer, Brittany Misencik
articles.title: 'American Idol' 2026 winner is picked tonight. Alicia Keys to perform - Pensacola News Journal
articles.description: The exciting three-hour 'American Idol' finale airs Monday, May 11, with performances by special guests sprinkled throughout the episode.
articles.content:
• The "American Idol" Top 3 finalists are Keyla Richardson, Hannah Harper, and Jordan McCullough.
